releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Minimal floating timer widget for Obsidian.

### Features
- Keyboard-first: type minutes, press Enter to start
- Decimal input (`.5` = 30s, `1.5` = 90s)
- Theme-aware SVG clock face with auto-switching tick marks (12/60)
- Procedural alarm melody — no audio files
- Multiple concurrent timers
- Status bar clock icon to spawn timers
- Draggable, minimizable, closable
releases.name: Tiny Timer v1.0.0
